headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Invitation Homes, Raises Price Target to $30
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Invitation Homes (NYSE:INVH) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $29 to $30.

headline: REITs: Cheap, Unloved, And Finally Showing Life
summary: REITs in 2026 are defying rising yields as fundamentals, M&A, NOI growth, and dividend hikes drive returns.
